picks.title: FOPAL Book Sale
picks.why: Three rooms of 70,000+ books, CDs, and DVDs at unbeatable prices—a treasure hunt for readers.

picks.title: Campbell Library Grand Opening
picks.why: Campbell Library's grand reopening features lion dancers, live music, and a bubble show—rare community celebration.

picks.title: Berryessa Art Festival
picks.why: The 49th Berryessa Art Festival draws thousands for art, food, and fun—South Bay's major annual arts event.

picks.title: Academy of Classical Ballet: The Four Seasons and Peter and the Wolf
picks.why: Two beautiful ballets—*The Four Seasons* and *Peter and the Wolf*—performed live with music for all ages.

picks.title: Poetry Open Mic — Poetry Month Celebration
picks.why: Multilingual poetry open mic on Mother's Day—celebrate voices and stories from your own community.
